name: Black Russian Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix the cake and pudding mixes according to their instructions.
3. Add cinnamon, instant coffee, and eggs to the mixture.
4. Pour batter into a greased baking pan.
5. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
6. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
